title: policy-atoms v1 atom
description: A single atom in the policy-atoms catalog. Supports two formats: (1) JSON policy format with 'schema', 'type', and nested 'policy' object; (2) TOML-sourced policy-dsl format with 'kind', 'class', and top-level 'expression_type', 'subject', 'action', 'conditions', 'effect' fields.

schema.description: JSON schema URI (present in JSON-format atoms).

type.description: Atom type discriminator (present in JSON-format atoms).

id.description: Atom identifier. Short form: '<category>/<slug>' or full form: 'policy-atoms/<class>/<slug>'.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 creation timestamp (present in TOML-format atoms).

class.description: Atom class, e.g. policy-dsl (present in TOML-format atoms).

expression_type.description: DSL expression intent (present in policy-dsl TOML atoms).

subject.description: Principal pattern this rule applies to (policy-dsl TOML atoms).

action.description: Operation pattern this rule governs (policy-dsl TOML atoms).

conditions.description: Predicate expressions for rule matching (policy-dsl TOML atoms).
